nasb.text: Therefore, keep up your courage, men, for I believe God that it will turn out exactly as I have been told.

esv.text: So take heart, men, for I have faith in God that it will be exactly as I have been told.

cnv.text: 所以，各位請放心。我相信　神對我怎樣說，也必怎樣成就。

ccb.text: 所以请各位放心，我深信上帝所说的话必然会成就。

csbs.text: 所以请各位振作起来，因为我相信神怎样对我说，事情也会怎样成就。
